title: Sean Penn Skips 2026 Oscars Ceremony
text: Sean Penn won the Best Supporting Actor award at the 2026 Academy Awards for his role in One Battle After Another, marking his third Oscar win. However, the acclaimed actor was notably absent from the March 15 ceremony. Actor Kieran Culkin accepted the award on Penn's behalf, stating: Sean Penn couldn't be here this evening, or didn't want to, so I'll be accepting the award on his behalf. According to reporting from The New York Times, Penn chose to skip the ceremony to remain in Ukraine, where he continues to support the country and President Volodymyr Zelenskyy amid the Russian invasion. Penn previously directed a documentary about the invasion titled Superpower. This marks an unusual move for the Oscar winner, as he also declined to attend the BAFTAs and Screen Actors Guild Awards, though he did appear at the Golden Globes ceremony (where he was nominated but did not win). Penn has been vocal about his criticism of the Academy in recent years, particularly regarding their handling of international affairs and security incidents at the ceremony.
